authority: independent read-only FORM-2 proposal evidence; never language or compiler authority

topology_policy.bundle_root: exactly one global program node, including one-source bundles
topology_policy.empty_source: no tree node; source identity and byte extent remain in BundleRootExtent
topology_policy.separator_owner: derived from adjacent terminal leaves; leading, final, inter-item, and zero-item boundaries are SourceBytes
topology_policy.source_projection: ordered item forest with no program node
